extraction.one_line_summary: LUTSENKO Alexey attacked solo on final 20% descent from 4-man breakaway, held 42 seconds to win at Alto de Cabra
tactical_patterns: LUTSENKO attacked before the climb started, not on steep sections, using tailwind and pre-positioning to maximize descent advantage.
Team Sky controlled peloton with calculated concession strategy, allowing 4-5 minute gap knowing break would fragment on 10% finish.
FROOME's team paced steadily to gain time on rivals while avoiding work, taking 8 seconds on VAN GARDEREN without effort.

rider_signals.LUTSENKO Alexey: positive: at 24, showed mature tactical anticipation attacking before climb, not on it, confirming progression pattern from Swiss/Nice stages
rider_signals.CONTADOR Alberto: positive: described as 'reborn' leading favorites group, significant context signal given his decline narrative entering race
rider_signals.KUDUS Merhawi: positive: finished second at 42 seconds in select break group, strong positioning for Eritrean on punchy summit finish
rider_signals.SOLER Marc: neutral: made early 16-rider break but couldn't follow final moves, useful baseline for his climbing ceiling
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: neutral: present in key 16-rider move but didn't animate finale, reserving for different terrain profile
rider_signals.FERNÁNDEZ Rubén: neutral: made key early selection but lacked descending speed to follow LUTSENKO's explosive descent acceleration
rider_signals.CHAVES Esteban: positive: jumped from 6th to 3rd GC without visible effort, positioning behind FROOME group suggests tactical restraint
rider_signals.VAN GARDEREN Tejay: negative: lost 8 seconds to main GC group despite no attacks, red flag for sustained steep gradient weakness
